sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_crc32 (id UInt32, text_value String, timestamp_value DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_crc32 VALUES (1, 'some sample text', now()), (2, 'another example', now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(text_value) AS checksum, timestamp_value + INTERVAL (CRC32IEEE(text_value) % 100) SECOND AS adjusted_time FROM test_crc32 WHERE timestamp_value > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY;

SELECT id, CRC32IEEE(text_value) AS checksum, adjusted_time FROM (SELECT id, text_value, timestamp_value + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS adjusted_time FROM test_crc32 WHERE timestamp_value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE checksum > 1000000000;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (data_value String, int_value UInt32);
SELECT data_value, CRC32IEEE(data_value) AS checksum FROM temp_data WHERE int_value = (SELECT MAX(int_value) FROM temp_data WHERE data_value IS NOT NULL) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
SELECT data_value, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM (SELECT data_value, CRC32IEEE(data_value) AS checksum FROM temp_data GROUP BY data_value HAVING checksum IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY data_value;
SELECT data_value FROM temp_data AS d JOIN test_crc32 AS t ON CRC32IEEE(d.data_value) = CRC32IEEE(t.text_value) + INTERVAL '1' DAY WHERE d.int_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (case_id UInt32, case_string Nullable(String), case_time DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO edge_cases VALUES (1, NULL, now()), (2, '', now() - INTERVAL 10 DAY), (3, 'max_sample_string_value', now() - INTERVAL 1 YEAR);
SELECT case_id, CRC32IEEE(case_string) AS case_checksum, case_time + INTERVAL (case_id % 12) MONTH AS future_time FROM edge_cases WHERE case_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(CRC32IEEE(case_string)) FROM edge_cases WHERE case_time < now() - INTERVAL 6 MONTH HAVING AVG(case_checksum) < 0;
